## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start server with `...`
2. Send request `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, HTTP status codes, and log output.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| cloudmorph-mcp version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 18.20.0 |
| Deployment | Docker / npm / source |
| AI tool | Cursor / Claude Code / Copilot / Windsurf / other |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |

## Relevant logs

```
Paste structured JSON log lines here (remove any tokens or secrets before pasting)
```

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (e.g. network configuration, proxy, TLS).
